title: Creamy Irish Noodle Bowl
description: A comforting and creamy noodle bowl dish inspired by Irish cuisine, perfect for a cold night.
instructions: Cook the garlicky noodles according to the package instructions.
In a saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to create a roux. Cook for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking continuously. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let it cook for 2-3 minutes or until it thickens.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the cream and shredded cheese.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Add the cooked noodles to the sauce and stir until well coated.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving bowl.
Garnish with chopped irish parsley and serve immediately.
